title: Transparent UI BG for Default Dark Mode
description: Makes the area behind the player in the inventory transparent, made for the Default Dark Mode texture pack.
body:
## greenie's transparent UI BG for Default Dark Mode
Removes the pesky black background that you see behind the player model in inventories.

## This pack is made to be used with the Default Dark Mode texture pack. [Click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) to download it.
See the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-ui-bg/gallery) for some screenshots of this pack in use.\
I highly recommend using the [inventory blur mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-blur) with this pack. It blurs the area behind the inventory and makes it look really nice.

---
Don't use Default Dark Mode? Get Transparent UI BG for the vanilla textures [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-ui-bg).
